briefing:
**MORNING BRIEFING - Tuesday, March 26, 2024**

Good morning! Here's what needs your attention today.

**TOP PRIORITIES**

1. **Benefits Enrollment** (HR) - Action required by Friday. Handle this first to avoid missing the deadline.

2. **Q1 Review Prep Materials** (Boss) - Needed for tomorrow's meeting. You have a 1:1 at 11am and prep block at 1pm to discuss/complete.

3. **Contract Renewal Signature** (Carol) - Required by March 28 to prevent service disruption. Carol will be in your 9am standup if you want to address quickly.

**TODAY'S SCHEDULE**

• 9:00-9:30am - Team Standup (Zoom) with Alice, Bob, Carol
• 11:00-11:30am - 1:1 with Boss (Boss's Office)
• 1:00-2:00pm - Q1 Review Prep - Solo Work Block (Desk)
• 2:00-3:30pm - Q1 Review Meeting (Conference Room B) with Boss, Alice, Finance
• 4:00-4:45pm - API Integration Pairing Session (Zoom) with Bob
• 5:30-5:45pm - End of Day Wrap-up (Desk)

**WATCH LIST**

• Alice sent an updated project roadmap draft that may need review before Friday
• Bob has API questions (conveniently scheduled for 4pm pairing session)
• IT maintenance tonight 11pm-2am (plan accordingly)

Your day flows well with Q1 prep strategically placed before the review meeting. Focus on those top 3 priorities and you'll be in good shape.
